understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of KA59 is to progress through all levels by positioning every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level's grid, achieving a WIN condition to complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the selected piece by 3 pixels per cell, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks or interacting uniquely with walls/obstacles; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece at the exact target_position coordinates; walls and objects block or modify movement variably, with hints from movement.blocked but requiring trial to confirm behavior; multiple selectables require strategic switching to maneuver all into goals before exhausting the per-level step budget.
